scripts.test:cli:unit: pnpm --filter @oml-__SERVICE_NAME__/core build && pnpm --filter @oml-__SERVICE_NAME__/api-client build && vitest run --config vitest.config.cli.unit.ts
scripts.test:cli:integration: pnpm --filter @oml-__SERVICE_NAME__/core build && pnpm --filter @oml-__SERVICE_NAME__/api-client build && vitest run --config vitest.config.cli.integration.ts
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:api & pnpm run dev:web & wait
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:api & pnpm run deploy:web & wait
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm run deploy:preview:api & pnpm run deploy:preview:web & wait
